name: RAID Capacity Calculator
seo_description: Calculate RAID array capacity. Free, fast and no sign-up required.
result_context: Capacidad usable and redundancia of the array
formula_display: RAID 0: n×s | RAID 1: s | RAID 5: (n-1)×s | RAID 6: (n-2)×s | RAID 10: (n/2)×s
mistakes: Use nivel RAID with muy few discos
desc: Free online raid capacity calculator. Enter driv is and drive size to get instant results.
